en.name: Word Search
en.desc: Classic word search puzzle! Find hidden words horizontally, vertically, or diagonally in a grid of letters. Great for improving pattern recognition and vocabulary skills.
en.howToPlay: Click and drag to select letters that form a word. Words can be horizontal, vertical, diagonal, and even backwards. Found words are crossed off the list.
tips: Scan for less common letters like Q, X, Z first
Look for the first letter of each target word
Work systematically from top to bottom

zh.name: 找词游戏
zh.desc: 经典找词游戏！在字母网格中水平、垂直或对角线方向寻找隐藏的单词。非常适合提升模式识别和词汇能力。
zh.howToPlay: 点击并拖动选择形成单词的字母。单词可以是水平、垂直、对角线，甚至反向。找到的单词会从列表中划掉。
tips: 首先扫描较少见的字母，如Q, X, Z
寻找每个目标单词的第一个字母
检查所有方向，包括对角线
